description: Full backup of both client portals before universal system migration. Includes reports, sections, and documents.

documents.notes: So we can embed your feed on the homepage

sections.title: Reference Site Analysis — What We Observed

items: ✅ All three reference sites (Raw Mango, Atelier Shikaarbagh, Matsya World) are built on Shopify — confirming Shopify is the right platform for your store
✅ Raw Mango is built on Dawn — Shopify's free theme — proving a luxury editorial look is achievable without a paid theme
✅ All three use a mega menu with Collections + Categories + Curations — this is the navigation structure we will build for you
✅ Drawer cart (slide-out) used by Raw Mango and Matsya — cleaner UX than full-page cart, included in your build
✅ WhatsApp floating button present on Raw Mango and Matsya — high-converting for Indian buyers, included in your build
✅ Razorpay / Indian payment methods are standard across all three — UPI, cards, net banking, wallets, EMI all covered

sections.title: Key Observations — What Makes These Sites Work

items: 🔴 Raw Mango took 14 versions (V14) of their site to reach where they are today — what you see is years of iteration and investment, not a one-time build
🟠 Matsya uses the Prestige theme (paid, ~₹28,000) — we are achieving the same look using Dawn (free) with custom code
🟠 All three brands invest heavily in professional photography — the luxury feel comes 60% from imagery, 40% from design. Strong product photography is critical.
🟡 None of the three brands use customer reviews on their site — this is actually a gap we can use to your advantage by adding Judge.me reviews from day one
🟡 Matsya's 'Book a Private Appointment' feature in the main nav drives high-value consultations — we can add this in Phase 2
✅ Platform: Shopify Basic (₹2,100/month approx — billed by Shopify directly to you)
✅ Theme: Dawn (Free — Shopify's flagship theme, used by Raw Mango)
✅ Domain: Purchased and managed by you directly on GoDaddy or Namecheap (~₹800–1,200/year)
✅ Payment Gateway: Razorpay (free to install, 2% per transaction — no monthly fee)
✅ Currency: INR
✅ Language: English (Hindi toggle available in Phase 2 — Raw Mango has this)
✅ Platform: Shopify (Dawn theme — same as your build, V14 after years of iteration)
✅ Aesthetic: Minimalist luxury — white backgrounds, deep forest green (#00552e) accent, clean typography
✅ Font: Assistant (sans-serif, Google Fonts — free)
✅ Navigation: Mega menu — Categories + Collections + Curations (3 columns)
✅ Hero: Video + image slider with caption overlay
✅ Cart: Drawer (slide-out)
✅ Swatches: Colour swatches with 'Show More' toggle
✅ WhatsApp: Floating button
✅ Hindi toggle: रॉ मैंगो — language switcher for Hindi audience
✅ Store locator: 6 physical stores (Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Delhi)
✅ Virtual appointment: Dedicated page
🟠 No customer reviews visible — a gap you can fill
🟠 No wishlist feature
🟠 INR only — no multi-currency
💡 Key learning: Their luxury feel is built on a free theme + strong photography. Design alone doesn't make it premium — the photography does.
✅ Platform: Shopify (Craft theme — paid ~₹28,000)
✅ Aesthetic: Heritage luxury — dark navy (#1e253d) + gold + cream. Rajkarigar artisan storytelling.
✅ Fonts: Garamond (serif headings) + Quattrocento Sans (body)
✅ Navigation: Mega menu — Collections (named after women: Urmila, Renuka, Ayesha) + Products
✅ Celebrity section: Kareena Kapoor Khan, Janhvi Kapoor wearing their pieces
✅ Press mentions: Carousel of media coverage
✅ Razorpay EMI: Installment payment options on product pages
✅ Add-on services: Blouse stitching option directly on product page
✅ Badges: NEW, Best Seller, Price on Request
🟠 No drawer cart — full page cart (less modern UX)
🟠 No WhatsApp button
🟠 No reviews, no wishlist
💡 Key learning: Named collections (after female characters) + celebrity endorsements create strong brand identity. Something to build toward.
✅ Platform: Shopify (Prestige theme — paid ~₹28,000)
✅ Aesthetic: Ultra-premium bridal couture — soft cream (#E9E5DF) + near-black + serif fonts
✅ Fonts: Crimson Text + Didot (both elegant serifs)
✅ Price range: ₹25,000 – ₹5,60,990 — bespoke couture positioning
✅ Navigation: 'Book a Private Appointment' in primary nav — drives high-value conversions
✅ WhatsApp: Persistent button + pre-filled message per product ('I'm interested in [product name]')
✅ Size guide: Modal with detailed measurements in cm and inches (women + men)
✅ Delivery timeline: '8–9 Weeks' on product pages — sets expectations for bespoke orders
✅ Multi-currency: 180+ currencies with auto-detection
✅ Cart: Drawer
✅ Celebrity section: 'Celebrities in Matsya' — Aditi Rao Hydari featured
🟠 No customer reviews
🟠 No wishlist
💡 Key learning: 'Book a Private Appointment' in nav is a high-converting feature for luxury fashion. Easy to add in Phase 2.
✅ Same platform (Shopify) — you are in the right ecosystem
✅ Same free theme base as Raw Mango (Dawn) — the look is achievable
✅ Same payment setup (Razorpay, UPI, EMI) as all three
✅ Mega menu (Phase 1) — built into your store from day one
✅ Drawer cart (Phase 1) — with free shipping threshold message
✅ WhatsApp button (Phase 1) — floating button on all pages
✅ Size guide (Phase 1) — modal popup on product pages
🟡 Celebrity / press section (Phase 2) — homepage feature showing press & Bollywood endorsements
🟡 Book a Private Appointment (Phase 2) — booking page with Google Calendar + WhatsApp confirmation
🟡 Hindi language toggle (Phase 2) — bilingual site like Raw Mango
🟡 Multi-currency (Phase 2) — auto-detect visitor location, show USD / EUR / GBP / AED
🟡 Advanced filters (Phase 2) — premium filter app for size, fabric, price, colour
🟡 Video hero (Phase 2) — full-width autoplay video homepage (requires video from you)

sections.title: Phase 1 — What We Are Building (Current Scope)

items: ✅ Shopify store setup on Basic plan (you pay Shopify ~₹2,100/month directly)
✅ Dawn theme — fully customised to luxury Indian fashion aesthetic
✅ Custom domain connected (you purchase domain separately ~₹800–1,200/year)
✅ Mega navigation — Categories + Collections + Curations
✅ Homepage — hero slider, editorial collection blocks, new arrivals grid, brand story section, Instagram feed, newsletter signup, WhatsApp floating button

✅ Product pages — multi-image gallery with zoom, colour swatches, size guide modal, sticky Add to Bag button, product tabs (Description / Fabric & Care / Shipping & Returns), WhatsApp enquiry button, related products
✅ Collection pages — Shopify native filters, 3-column grid desktop / 2-column mobile, product badges (New, Best Seller, Sold Out)
✅ Drawer cart with free shipping threshold message
✅ Razorpay payment gateway — UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, wallets, EMI
✅ Tax configuration for Indian orders
✅ All standard pages — About, Brand Story, Contact, FAQ, Shipping Policy, Returns & Exchange, Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions
✅ Basic SEO — meta titles, descriptions, image alt text, sitemap
✅ Mobile-first responsive design — tested on all screen sizes
✅ ShipRocket order tracking integration
✅ Klaviyo email setup (free tier — abandoned cart, welcome email)
💡 Investment: ₹49,000
💡 Payment: 50% advance (₹24,500) to begin | 50% on delivery (₹24,500)
💡 Timeline: 4–5 weeks from content receipt

sections.title: Phase 2 — What Can Be Added Later

items: 🟡 'Book a Private Appointment' feature — dedicated booking page with calendar, connected to Google Calendar, automated WhatsApp confirmation (like Matsya)
🟡 Celebrity / Press section — homepage section showcasing celebrities or press features (like Shikaarbagh + Matsya)
🟡 Video hero — full-width autoplay video on homepage (requires product video from you, like Raw Mango)
🟡 Hindi language toggle — bilingual site for Hindi-speaking audience (like Raw Mango's रॉ मैंगो)
🟡 Multi-currency — auto-detect visitor location and show prices in USD, EUR, GBP, AED etc. (like Matsya's 180+ currencies)
🟡 Advanced product filters — size, fabric, price range, colour filters using a premium filter app
🟡 Wishlist — let customers save products and return to purchase later
🟡 Customer reviews — Judge.me integration for verified reviews, photo reviews, review widgets
🟡 WhatsApp automation — automated order confirmations, shipping updates, abandoned cart recovery via WhatsApp (Wati/Interakt)
🟡 Lookbook / Shop the Look — editorial page where customers can shop entire styled outfits in one click (like Raw Mango)
🟡 Loyalty program — reward repeat customers with points and discounts
🟡 Size recommendation tool — AI-based size finder ('What's my size?') to reduce returns
🟡 SEO content — monthly blog posts targeting search terms like 'handloom sarees online', 'luxury kurta sets India'
🟡 Google Ads + Meta Ads setup — paid acquisition campaigns targeting your ideal buyer
💡 Investment: ₹95,000 (Phase 1 + Phase 2 combined)
💡 Payment: 50% advance (₹47,500) to begin | 50% on delivery (₹47,500)
💡 Timeline: 6–8 weeks from content receipt
🟡 Proposal Sent — April 2026
⬜ Agreement Signed + Advance Received
⬜ Kick-off Call — Content collection, brand preferences, collection structure
⬜ Figma Mockups Shared — Homepage + Product page preview for approval
⬜ Development Begins — Shopify store setup + Dawn theme customisation
⬜ Content Upload — Products, collections, pages populated
⬜ Review on Staging — Client review before go-live
⬜ Revisions + Final Approval
⬜ Go Live — Domain connected, payments tested, store launched
⬜ Handover + Training — 30-min walkthrough on managing your store

content.text: sageandveda.com is a Shopify store on the DT Theme (Debutify family) with serious performance, SEO, and CRO gaps that are costing conversions every day. The homepage currently weighs 32MB — 16× heavier than industry best practice — primarily due to SVG banners being used instead of optimised images. Klaviyo loads 8 times per page. There are zero H1 tags and zero structured data anywhere on the site. The cart page is completely bare. These are fixable, high-impact problems.

items: 🔴 Homepage = 32MB total — SVG banners used as photos: New_roll-on_Banner_Shopify.svg (12.5MB), Roll-on_shopify_mobile_768x940.svg (12.5MB), banner_Jan.svg (3.2MB), Amrit_Jan_768x940.svg (3.2MB). Fix: re-export all as WebP, max 150KB each.
🔴 DOM Content Loaded: 4.8 seconds (target: under 2s)
🔴 Klaviyo loaded 8 times — critical script duplication bug causing repeated tracking calls
🔴 Google Ads / GTM loaded twice — duplicate tracking tags
🔴 9 render-blocking CSS files: dt-framework, dt-custom, swiper, select2, slick, font-all, and more
🔴 64–67 JS files per page (target: under 20)
🔴 Zero lazy loading on homepage images
🔴 All Mulish font faces show status 'unloaded' — FOUT issue, no preload hints in <head>
🟠 PDP = 5.7MB, recommended product images stuck as loading.gif (lazy-load broken on product page)
🔴 ZERO H1 tags on any page — homepage, collection, PDP, about page all missing H1
🔴 ZERO structured data (JSON-LD) anywhere — no Product, Organization, FAQ, or Breadcrumb schema
🔴 H2 content duplicated 3× on homepage — sections rendering in triplicate (theme bug)
🔴 All page headings use H4 on About page — heading hierarchy broken site-wide
🔴 Meta title includes domain: 'www.sageandveda.com – sage & veda' (wrong format, wastes characters)
🔴 Meta description = 26 characters: 'Next global wellness house' — not keyword-optimised
🔴 PDP meta description = 18 characters: 'Hydrating Body Oil' — not useful for search
🟠 Collection page title: 'all – sage & veda' — generic, no keywords
🟠 About page title: 'About – sage & veda' — no keywords
🟠 No breadcrumb navigation anywhere on site
🟠 No hreflang tags (international audience likely given pricing in USD)
🟠 15 homepage images without alt text, 12 with empty alt attributes
🔴 Cart page completely bare — no upsell, no free shipping progress bar, no trust badges, no express checkout (Shop Pay / Apple Pay / Google Pay), no gift note option
🔴 No sticky Add-to-Cart on PDP — button scrolls off-screen, user must scroll back up to purchase
🔴 'PLEASE CHOOSE' variant default on homepage carousel — blocks add-to-cart for visitors who don't notice
🔴 Star ratings not showing on collection page cards — Judge.me is enabled but not surfaced in theme card templates
🔴 Only 2 reviews shown on homepage despite 25 reviews at 4.64★ average
🟠 No free shipping callout near ATC button on PDP
🟠 No shipping / returns information near Add-to-Cart
🟠 Announcement bar offer '17% off + heart necklace with orders $65+' not reinforced near ATC
🟠 'Design Themes' credit link in footer — unprofessional, should be removed
🟠 Footer 'Contact Us' link duplicated twice in Quick Links
🟠 No TikTok social link (only FB, Pinterest, Instagram, LinkedIn present)
🟠 No Instagram feed / UGC section on homepage or PDPs
🟠 No express checkout anywhere on site

competitors.name: Sage & Veda
competitors.notes: SVG banners, 64+ JS files, no H1, no schema, bare cart

competitors.name: Indewild
competitors.notes: Instagram feed, video, Organization + WebSite schema, sticky header, TikTok presence

competitors.name: Fable & Mane
competitors.notes: Best performer. Full schema (WebSite + Organization + BreadcrumbList + ItemList), H1, Bundle Builder, multi-currency. 61 lazy-loaded images.

competitors.name: Ranavat
competitors.notes: 449 lazy-loaded images, video homepage, Skin Quiz nav item, Instagram feed, Discovery sizes, Gift Cards

content.text: These are the four PDPs you referenced as benchmarks. Each does something exceptional worth replicating on Sage & Veda.
items: Hello Sanctuary (/products/red-panda): Charitable mission integrated near ATC ('Together we have raised $133,122 for Red Pandas'), 13 gallery images, Product schema, breadcrumbs, free shipping callout + 30-day guarantee near ATC. Page: 947KB.

The Ouai (/products/detox-shampoo): Problem-first headline pattern ('OVERDID IT LAST WEEK? TIME TO DETOX.' before product name), sticky ATC, 'PERFECT FOR' benefit tags (Oiliness/Shine/Flaky scalp), scent story section, free sample selector. Page: 343KB.
Rhode Skin (/products/glazing-milk): 'COMPLETE THE ROUTINE / THE RHODE KIT' cross-sell module below ATC — drives bundle revenue. Sticky ATC, video, 5 schema types. Page: 1.1MB.
Olaplex (/products/n-3plus): 'CLINICAL RESULTS' section with data builds credibility for premium pricing. Sticky ATC, cross-sell Recommended Routine, video, 112 lazy images. Page: 2.2MB.

content.text: Your Canva mockup (amarjapawar.my.canva.site/sage-veda-website-2026) shows a strong editorial direction — dark background, warm off-white typography, serif font (Times), mood-led navigation. This is a significant upgrade from the current Debutify theme.
items: ✅ Dark editorial aesthetic is on-brand and competitive — closest to Fable & Mane / Ranavat
✅ Mood-led category navigation (face / hair / home / rituals / about) is a UX upgrade
✅ Product storytelling first, SKU grid second — correct priority for wellness brand
✅ 'OUR EVERYDAY ESSENTIAL' feature section builds hero product authority
✅ Philosophy section ('our philosophy — Wellness, designed...') differentiates from competitors
⚠️ Testimonials marked as placeholder — will need real review content before launch
⚠️ Mobile rendering needs verification — dark + serif can be hard to read on small screens
⚠️ 11 homepage sections is ambitious — ensure page weight stays under 2MB

rows.label: Fix GTM / Google Ads duplicate tags
Add H1 to every page template
Surface Judge.me stars on collection cards
Add free shipping progress bar to cart
